chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1181 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 25.04.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Muhammad Aslam on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and Mohsin Raza Mangi, on behalf of District Accounts Officer, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, while reading the order dated 18.10.2023 regarding statement of Police Department to the effect that they have already written a letter to the Finance Department seeking permission to issue arrears to the petitioner on the ground that whenever the cumulative amount of arrears on account of pay and allowances is for more than six months such permission is required, has submitted that if directions are issued to the respondents to resolve grievance of the petitioner within two months in terms of aforesaid order, he would be satisfied and will not press this petition. Learned AAG has undertaken to do so. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms under compliance report to this Court. Judge Judge ARBROHI
